---
title: "Given to Hospitality."
---

## Given to Hospitality.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Non-fiction: advice to charity workers
**Format:** Pamphlet

**Publisher:** Walter Smith (late Mozley), 34 King Street, Covent Garden, London.

### Notes

A pamphlet encouraging people to have convalescents to stay.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
